_comment: Contexte pre-calcule par le director en debut de cycle. Lu par les agents a la place de tous les docs.

selected_tasks.title: 5 cautious healer deep runs -- confirm net drain math post-T042
Biome toast: 2s overlay when entering new biome section
20 new foret_broceliande batch2 cards (Ogham-rich, druides<=30%, anciens>=25%)
aria-label on all 14 minigame canvases for accessibility

cycle15_completed.T044: Ogham HUD badge (top-center, pulsing, x1.5 text) added in HUD.ts
cycle15_completed.marais_batch2: 20 new marais_korrigans cards appended to cards.json (226 total)
cycle15_completed.T042: HEAL_LIFE halved after card 20 in EffectEngine (Math.max(1, Math.floor(raw*0.5)))

t040_playtester_brief.strategy: cautious healer -- always pick highest HEAL_LIFE option

check_per_stage.stage1_cards_1_15: drain -1/card, avg heal ~4.47 -> net ~+3.47 (expected positive, healing phase)
check_per_stage.stage2_cards_16_25: drain -2/card, heal halved after card 20: avg ~2.2 -> net +0.2 (marginal, should be near-zero)

t040_playtester_brief.verdict_pass: stage2 net per card <= +0.5, stage3 net per card < 0

biome_toast_brief.approach: On run start and on every ~8th card, show a 2s toast overlay with current biome label
biome_toast_brief.toast_style: position:absolute, bottom:80px, left:50%, transform:translateX(-50%), bg dark, text amber, fade-in 300ms, fade-out 300ms, auto-dismiss 2s
biome_toast_brief.trigger: on biome change (run start) or manually every 8 cards to remind player
biome_toast_brief.prefer_simple: just add showBiomeToast(biomeName) utility + call it in main.ts on run start

foret_batch2_brief.append_location: Before the final ] -- insert 20 new card objects with leading , separator
foret_batch2_brief.themes: foret broceliande second batch: druides second set. Oak groves with ancient Ogham stones, druid initiations, moon rituals by standing stones, sacred wells, mistletoe harvest, ancestral memory in tree rings, spirits of the forest, old druid debates about Ogham meanings. Richer in Ogham lore than batch1.

constraints.ogham_references: at least 8 of 20 cards must reference an Ogham name (Beith, Luis, Nion, Fearn, Sail, Huath, Dair, Tinne, Coll, Quert, Muin, Gort, nGetal, Straif, Ruis) in narrative or options
constraints.effects_per_option: 1-3 effects, no option with 3+ DAMAGE effects

aria_label_brief.pattern:
After createElement('canvas'), add: this.canvas.setAttribute('aria-label', '<descriptive name>');
  this.canvas.setAttribute('role', 'application');
